title: Exotic Spicy Saudi Arabian Cannellini Beans Tagine
description: A sweet and juicy Saudi Arabian dish featuring cannellini beans, this exotic tagine is perfect for adventurous eaters, this low-glycemic-friendly recipe combines the flavors of the Middle East with the comfort of a hearty stew.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large clay or ceramic tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is softened and lightly browned, about 8 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Stir in the ground cumin, smoked paprika, and cayenne pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cannellini beans, diced tomatoes, chicken broth, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 25 minutes.
Use a kitchen torch to flambe the dish, or simmer over low heat for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
